

``` {r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(car)
```

``` {r}
df = read.csv('txn_atac_AT_TSS_regression_data_ref_GRCm38.81.csv')
df$stage <- factor(df$stage, levels = c("early_RS", "int_RS", "late_RS", "early_ES"))

names(df)[names(df) == "mean_ATAC"] <- "ATAC"
# 1. Isolate the 'Initial State' (Transcription in early_RS)
initial_states <- df %>%
  filter(stage == "early_RS") %>%
  select(gene_name, txn) %>%
  rename(txn_start = txn) %>%
  distinct()

# 2. Calculate specific cutoffs
# We need the 25th, 50th, and 95th percentiles
cuts <- quantile(initial_states$txn_start, probs = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.95))

# 3. Assign groups based on your specific definition
# Low: Between 25% and 50%
# High: Above 95%
initial_states <- initial_states %>%
  mutate(txn_group = case_when(
    txn_start > cuts["95%"] ~ "High_Top5",
    txn_start >= cuts["25%"] & txn_start <= cuts["50%"] ~ "Low_25_50",
    TRUE ~ "Medium" # Everything else (50-95%)
  ))

# 4. Merge back and filter out the "Medium" group
df_stratified <- left_join(df, 
                           select(initial_states, gene_name, txn_group), 
                           by = "gene_name") %>%
  filter(txn_group != "Medium")

df_stratified$txn_group <- factor(df_stratified$txn_group, 
                                  levels = c("Low_25_50", "High_Top5"))

df_stratified <- df_stratified %>%
  mutate(
    time = case_when(
      stage == "early_RS" ~ 0,
      stage == "int_RS"   ~ 1,
      stage == "late_RS"  ~ 2,
      stage == "early_ES" ~ 3
    ),
    
    time_post_knot = ifelse(time > 2, time - 2, 0)
  )

# Calculate baseline (early_RS) for each gene
baselines <- df_stratified %>%
  filter(stage == "early_RS") %>%
  select(gene_name, ATAC_baseline = ATAC)

# Join and calculate the change (Delta)
df_delta <- df_stratified %>%
  left_join(baselines, by = "gene_name") %>%
  mutate(ATAC_delta = ATAC - ATAC_baseline)


# Fit the piecewise model on the DELTA
m_delta <- lmer(ATAC_delta ~ txn_group * time + 
                             txn_group * time_post_knot + 
                             (1 | gene_name),
                na.action = na.exclude,
                data = df_delta)
```

```{r}
summary(m_delta)
```


```{r}
# Categorical Model
m_categorical <- lmer(ATAC_delta ~ txn_group * factor(stage) + (1 | gene_name), data = df_delta)


summary(m_categorical)
# Compare them
anova(m_delta, m_categorical)
```



``` {r}
# test beta4 = beta5 = 0
library(car)
linearHypothesis(m_piecewise, c("txn_groupHigh_Top5:time = 0", 
                                "txn_groupHigh_Top5:time_post_knot = 0"))
```

```{r}
# 3. Generate Predictions for Plotting ------------------------------------
# Use the pred_data structure from your methods
pred_delta <- pred_data 
pred_delta$predicted_delta <- predict(m_delta, newdata = pred_delta, re.form = NA)
```


```{r}
# 1. PREP: Labels
n_counts <- df_delta %>%
  group_by(txn_group) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(gene_name))

n_high <- n_counts$n[n_counts$txn_group == "High_Top5"]
n_low  <- n_counts$n[n_counts$txn_group == "Low_25_50"]

# Labels for the main legend
txn_labels <- c(
  "High_Top5" = paste0("High (n=", n_high, ")"),
  "Low_25_50" = paste0("Low (n=", n_low, ")")
)
```


```{r}
# 2. VISUALIZATION
p = ggplot(pred_delta, aes(x = stage_label, y = predicted_delta)) +
    # C. Ribbons (Mapped to FILL)
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = txn_group, group= txn_group), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  
  # D. Trajectories (Mapped to COLOR)
  # We force linetype="solid" here so it doesn't interfere with the Knot legend
  geom_line(aes(color = txn_group, group = txn_group), 
            linewidth = 1.5, linetype = "solid") +
  
  geom_point(aes(color = txn_group, group = txn_group), 
             size = 4) +
  # A. Baseline Reference
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey80") +
  
  # B. The Knot (Mapped to LINETYPE only)
  # We set a fixed color (grey) but map linetype to a string to create a legend
  geom_vline(aes(linetype = "knot", xintercept = "late_RS"), color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # 3. SCALES (Separated) -------------------------------------------------
  
  # LEGEND 1: TRANSCRIPTION GROUP (Color & Fill)
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Transcription Group", 
    values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00"),
    labels = txn_labels
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Transcription Group",
    values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00"),
    labels = txn_labels
  ) +
  
  # LEGEND 2: THE KNOT (Linetype only)
  scale_linetype_manual(
    name = NULL, # No header for this legend
    values = c("knot" = "dotted"),
    labels = c("knot" = "Linear Spline Knot")
  ) +
  
  # 4. FORMATTING
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("early_RS", "int_RS", "late_RS", "early_ES"), 
                   labels = c("Early RS", "Int RS", "Late RS", "Early ES")) +
  
  labs(title = "Rate of Remodeling: Change from Baseline",
       y = expression(Delta * " ATAC Signal (Z-score)"),
       x = "Developmental Stage") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    # 1. MAKE TICK MARKS THICKER
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 2, color = "black"), 
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"), # Optional: Make them longer too
    
    # 2. MAKE TICK LABELS BIGGER
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    # Stack the legends vertically
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    # 1. MAKE LEGEND TEXT BIGGER
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    # 2. MAKE THE COLORED BOXES/LINES BIGGER
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 30, b = 10, l = 10) 
  )

ggsave("/Users/zapell/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox-UniversityofMichigan/Zachary Apell/HiC_collaborations/figure_plots/final_figs/fig5b_change_from_baseline_trajectory_plot_earlyRS.png", plot = p, width = 12, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
n_counts <- df_delta %>%
  group_by(txn_group) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(gene_name))

n_high <- n_counts$n[n_counts$txn_group == "High_Top5"]
n_low  <- n_counts$n[n_counts$txn_group == "Low_25_50"]

custom_labels <- c(
  "High_Top5" = paste0("High Txn (n=", n_high, ")"),
  "Low_25_50" = paste0("Low Txn (n=", n_low, ")"),
  "Knot"      = "Linear Spline Knot"
)

# Calculate SE for Delta predictions
mm_d <- model.matrix(delete.response(terms(m_delta)), pred_delta)
pred_delta$se <- sqrt(diag(mm_d %*% vcov(m_delta) %*% t(mm_d)))
pred_delta$lower <- pred_delta$predicted_delta - 1.96 * pred_delta$se
pred_delta$upper <- pred_delta$predicted_delta + 1.96 * pred_delta$se

# 4. Visualization --------------------------------------------------------
ggplot(pred_delta, aes(x = stage_label, y = predicted_delta, color = txn_group, group = txn_group)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") + # Baseline marker
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = "late_RS", 
                 color = "Knot", 
                 linetype = "Knot"), 
             linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # Confidence intervals
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = txn_group), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  
  # Trajectory lines
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = NULL, # Remove legend title for a cleaner look
    values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", 
               "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00", 
               "Knot" = "grey60"), # Color for the knot
    labels = custom_labels,
    breaks = c("High_Top5", "Low_25_50", "Knot") # Force the order
  ) +
  
  scale_linetype_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("High_Top5" = "solid", 
               "Low_25_50" = "solid", 
               "Knot" = "dotted"), # Linetype for the knot
    labels = custom_labels,
    breaks = c("High_Top5", "Low_25_50", "Knot")
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00")) +
  
  # 'limits' forces the X-axis to follow this exact sequence
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("early_RS", "int_RS", "late_RS", "early_ES"), 
                   labels = c("Early RS", "Int RS", "Late RS", "Early ES")) +
  
  labs(title = "Rate of Remodeling: Change from Baseline",
       y = expression(Delta * " ATAC Signal from early RS (Z-score)"),
       x = "Developmental Stage") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right", 
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 30, b = 10, l = 10) 
  )
```

``` {r}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2)) 
# Plot 1: Residuals vs Fitted (Linearity Check)
plot(fitted(m_delta), resid(m_delta), 
     xlab = "Fitted Values", ylab = "Residuals",
     main = "Residuals vs Fitted",
     col = rgb(0,0,0,0.2), pch = 19) # Transparency helps with many points
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lwd = 2)
# Plot 2: Q-Q Plot (Normality Check)
qqnorm(resid(m_delta), main = "Q-Q Plot of Residuals")
qqline(resid(m_delta), col = "red", lwd = 2)
```

```{r}
hist(residuals(m_delta))
```

```{r}
library(broom.mixed) # For easy model extraction

# 1. Generate Predictions for the entire dataset
# We use the 'df_delta' dataframe which contains the raw observed values
df_delta$predicted_delta <- predict(m_delta)
# 1. Filter out the baseline (early_RS) where Delta is always 0
df_diag <- df_delta %>% 
  filter(stage != "early_RS") # <--- CRITICAL STEP

# 2. Calculate Correlation on the non-zero stages only
# This gives you the "honest" accuracy of the model's predictions
cor_val <- cor(df_diag$ATAC_delta, df_diag$predicted_delta, use = "complete.obs")
r_squared <- cor_val^2

# 3. Plot the diagnostic without the zero-anchor
ggplot(df_diag, aes(x = ATAC_delta, y = predicted_delta, color = stage)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +
  
  # Smooth line to check for bias
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = FALSE, linetype = "solid") +
  
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "mako", name = "Stage (t > 0)") +
  
  annotate("text", x = min(df_diag$ATAC_delta), y = max(df_diag$predicted_delta), 
           label = paste0("Pearson r = ", round(cor_val, 3), "\nR² = ", round(r_squared, 3)),
           hjust = 0, fontface = "bold", size = 5) +
  
  labs(title = "Model Diagnostic: Predicted vs. Observed (Excluding Baseline)",
       subtitle = "Accuracy of predicting change after t=0",
       x = "Observed Delta",
       y = "Predicted Delta") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```


```{r}
library(performance)

# Calculate the official R2 for Mixed Models
r2_results <- r2(m_delta)

print(r2_results)
```

```{r}
# 1. Filter out the baseline
df_diag <- df_delta %>% 
  filter(stage != "early_RS")

# 2. Calculate Correlation
cor_val <- cor(df_diag$ATAC_delta, df_diag$predicted_delta, use = "complete.obs")
r_squared <- cor_val^2

# 3. Plot with Robust Annotation
ggplot(df_diag, aes(x = ATAC_delta, y = predicted_delta, color = stage)) +
  # THE DOTTED LINE: Perfect Prediction (y=x)
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = FALSE, linetype = "solid") +
  
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "mako", name = "Stage (t > 0)") +
  
  # FIX: Use -Inf and Inf to pin text to Top-Left corner
  # vjust = 1 puts it just inside the top margin, hjust = 0 puts it just inside the left margin
  annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("  Pearson r = ", round(cor_val, 3), "\n  R² = ", round(r_squared, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.2, fontface = "bold", size = 5) +
  
  labs(title = "Model Diagnostic: Predicted vs. Observed",
       subtitle = "Dashed Line = Perfect Prediction (y=x)",
       x = "Observed Delta",
       y = "Predicted Delta") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```




```{r}
# 1. Calculate Metagene Statistics (Mean & 95% CI)
# We aggregate the Delta values to get the population average at each stage
metagene_data <- df_delta %>%
  group_by(stage, txn_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_delta = mean(ATAC_delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_delta   = sd(ATAC_delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    n          = n(),
    se         = sd_delta / sqrt(n),
    # Calculate 95% Confidence Interval for the ribbon
    ci_lower   = mean_delta - 1.96 * se,
    ci_upper   = mean_delta + 1.96 * se,
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

# Ensure the stage order is correct (Critical for line plots)
metagene_data$stage <- factor(metagene_data$stage, 
                              levels = c("early_RS", "int_RS", "late_RS", "early_ES"))

# 2. Generate the Plot
ggplot(metagene_data, aes(x = stage, y = mean_delta, group = txn_group, color = txn_group)) +
  
  # A. The Confidence Ribbon (95% CI)
  # This shows how incredibly tight the "true mean" is, despite the individual gene noise
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper, fill = txn_group), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # B. The Metagene Line (The Trend)
  geom_line(linewidth = 2) +
  
  # C. The Points (Visual Anchors)
  geom_point(size = 5, shape = 21, fill = "white", stroke = 2) +
  
  # D. Reference Lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  
  # Formatting
  scale_color_manual(values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00"),
                     labels = c("High Txn", "Low Txn")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00"),
                    labels = c("High Txn", "Low Txn")) +
  
  labs(title = "Metagene Analysis: Population Trajectories",
       subtitle = "Aggregated Mean Delta +/- 95% Confidence Interval",
       y = expression(Delta * " ATAC Signal (Z-score)"),
       x = "Developmental Stage") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"))
```




```{r}
# 1. Calculate Observed Means and SE for Delta
# Note: We group by 'stage' to see the raw mean change at each step
raw_obs_delta <- df_delta %>%
  group_by(stage, txn_group) %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean = mean(ATAC_delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_se   = sd(ATAC_delta, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), 
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(stage_label = stage)

# 2. Extract Sample Sizes
n_counts <- df_delta %>%
  group_by(txn_group) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(gene_name))

n_high <- n_counts$n[n_counts$txn_group == "High_Top5"]
n_low  <- n_counts$n[n_counts$txn_group == "Low_25_50"]

custom_labels <- c(
  "High_Top5" = paste0("High Txn (n=", n_high, ")"),
  "Low_25_50" = paste0("Low Txn (n=", n_low, ")"),
  "Knot"      = "Linear Spline Knot"
)

# 3. Enhanced Visualization -----------------------------------------------
ggplot() +
  # 1. MODEL UNCERTAINTY (Back Layer): The shaded ribbon
  # This shows the 95% CI of the LMM.
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_delta, 
              aes(x = stage_label, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = txn_group, group = txn_group), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) + 
  
  # 2. MODEL PREDICTION: The dotted lines
  geom_line(data = pred_delta, 
            aes(x = stage_label, y = predicted_delta, color = txn_group, group = txn_group), 
            linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  # 3. OBSERVED PRECISION (Front Layer): Thick error bars
  # This shows the raw SE of the thousands of genes.
  geom_errorbar(data = raw_obs_delta, 
                aes(x = stage_label, ymin = obs_mean - obs_se, ymax = obs_mean + obs_se, color = txn_group),
                width = 0.15, linewidth = 1.2) + 
  
  # 4. OBSERVED MEANS: The actual data points
  geom_point(data = raw_obs_delta, 
             aes(x = stage_label, y = obs_mean, fill = txn_group), 
             shape = 21, size = 4, color = "white", stroke = 1) +
  
  # C. BASELINE & KNOT MARKERS
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = "late_RS", linetype = "solid", alpha = 0.2) +

  # Formatting
  scale_color_manual(
    name = NULL, # Remove legend title for a cleaner look
    values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", 
               "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00", 
               "Knot" = "grey60"), # Color for the knot
    labels = custom_labels,
    breaks = c("High_Top5", "Low_25_50", "Knot") # Force the order
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High_Top5" = "#0072B2", "Low_25_50" = "#D55E00")) +
  
  labs(title = "Chromatin Remodeling Dynamics",
       subtitle = "Dotted lines: LMM predictions | Points: Raw Mean Delta +/- SE",
       y = expression(Delta * " ATAC Signal (Z-score)"),
       x = "Developmental Stage") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_blank())
```
